description: Panel discussion on the importance of community engagement and giving back in the crypto space, featuring insights from founders of various projects including Dfinity and wumbo.
topic_summary: Exploration of community building through incentives like airdrops and support for creators, emphasizing the balance between short-term rewards and long-term engagement [t=176.88].
aliases: Breakpoint 2021: Why Fast Blockchains Should Keep Giving Things Away
